messages.content:
**CCC — Connect–Claude Code**

A SKILL asset kit (not a framework codebase) that connects Claude Code's execution capability to any IDE tool (Trae / Cursor / Zed / VS Code / OpenCode).

**Structure:**
- `SKILL.md` — single prompt injected at agent startup
- `skills/ccc-<role>/SKILL.md` × 7 — per-role skill definitions
- 12 red lines (`references/red-lines.md`) + 7-role system + CCC Engine serial driver (v0.20.1+)

**7 roles:** product / dev / reviewer / tester / kb / board-server / engine

**Core assets:** scripts/ (board, engine, executor, watchdog), templates/ (plan/phases/report/verdict), .ccc/ (profile + state for context hand-off between roles).

> Project context was truncated at 4000 chars. Full details live in `README.md` (positioning) and `docs/roadmap.md` (route). Want me to pull anything specific from those?
